mnemonics: People Justify Relatively Easily Making Choices To Get The Best Hens
Kids Keep Ruthless Sailors Away Doing Hungry Work
keyPoints: Prim's Algorithm: Start at a node, keep adding edges until you reach all nodes
Kruskal's Algorithm: Sort all edges, start with the smallest and connect nodes
Dijkstra's Algorithm: Start at a node, find the shortest path to all nodes
Huffman Trees: Assign symbols to nodes with the lowest total weight
Huffman Codes: Assign codes to symbols based on the Huffman Tree
